name: Road Security Detail
desc: Patrol the commercial corridor between the fort and the nearest settlement node. Deter opportunistic threats, log anomalies, submit a contact report.
flavour: Half a day out, half a day back, a marginal threat assessment, and a modest transfer to the company account.
tooltip: Entry-level security work. Low risk, low reward, consistent volume.

name: Logistics Escort
desc: A freight operator needs armed escort through the lowland transit zone. The cargo is not sensitive. The transit corridor is moderately contested.
flavour: He checks the mana-manifest twice before departure. Keep the freight intact and his transfer clears automatically.
tooltip: Standard escort contract. Reliable income for minimal operational complexity.

name: Site Perimeter Security
desc: Monitor a heritage protection zone that has been flagged for unauthorised access. Maintain overnight perimeter observation and submit an incident log.
flavour: The zone is marked as restricted under pre-Accord heritage legislation. Someone has been ignoring the markers.
tooltip: Requires Level 2 and END 10+.

name: Residual Entity Clearance
desc: A decommissioned agricultural site is showing active mana-field anomalies consistent with anchored entity presence. Identify, document, and neutralise.
flavour: The previous tenants did not leave cleanly. That is now the Iron Company's operational brief.
tooltip: Requires at least 1 MAG or a practitioner in the roster.

name: Armed Group Interdiction
desc: A flagged armed group has been operating in the transit corridor without licence or Accord registration. Locate, engage, and submit a clearance report. The bounty clears on verified confirmation.
flavour: They have operated long enough to establish a pattern. Patterns can be used against them.
tooltip: Requires CUN 6+.

name: High-Value Logistics Escort
desc: A commercial logistics convoy is transporting mana-sensitive cargo through a contested zone. Armed escort required for the full transit. Zero tolerance for cargo compromise.
flavour: The cargo manifest is classified. Your job is the crate's physical safety, not its contents.
tooltip: Extended contract. Requires roster of 2+.

name: Unlicensed Arcane Group Dispersal
desc: An unlicensed mana-practice group has established operations in a residential area. The Accord has not yet acted. The client cannot wait for the Accord. Disperse and document.
flavour: They believe what they are doing is beyond Accord jurisdiction. That belief is about to be tested.
tooltip: Requires MAG 3+ and a practitioner.

name: Liminal Zone Stabilisation
desc: A mana-liminal boundary zone has become unstable, allowing cross-liminal entity incursion. Stabilise the boundary, document the anomaly parameters, and return control to the local grid authority.
flavour: Liminal zones are not fully mapped by the Accord. That makes them profitable and hazardous in roughly equal measure.
tooltip: Requires MAG 4+ or at least one practitioner with binding experience.

name: Siege Support Operation
desc: Provide specialised force support to an allied operation conducting a fortified position assault. The primary force is in place. The Iron Company provides the breakthrough capability they lack.
flavour: They have the force. They do not have the specialised capability. We do. The contract reflects this.
tooltip: Requires STR 14+ or a Siege Engineer.

name: Anomalous Entity Investigation
desc: A regional grid authority has detected an anomalous mana-signature that does not match any classified entity type. Investigate, document, and assess threat level. Full report on delivery.
flavour: Classified as unknown is not the same as classified as harmless. The distinction matters in the field.
tooltip: Requires MAG 5+ and practitioner on roster.

name: Tribal Incursion Response
desc: An unregulated tribal group has been conducting raids on registered commercial infrastructure. Respond to active incursions, establish deterrence, and submit a territorial security report.
flavour: They are not part of the Accord framework and do not intend to be. That simplifies the operational brief considerably.
tooltip: Requires roster of 3+ and combined STR 30+.

name: High-Output Arcane Target Neutralisation
desc: A high-capacity mana-user operating outside Accord licensing has been coordinating tribal raids and has demonstrated combat-grade output. Extract or neutralise. The client accepts either outcome.
flavour: Significant unregistered mana-capacity in an active conflict zone. The target is the reason the raids have escalated.
tooltip: Requires MAG 8+. High threat — do not underestimate the working in progress.

name: Executive Protection Detail
desc: Close protection assignment for a high-value individual attending a politically sensitive meeting. Threat assessment indicates active hostile interest from at least one competing party.
flavour: The client is aware of the threat level and is attending regardless. That makes our operational brief slightly more complex.
tooltip: Requires LEAD 8+ and 2+ roster for effective coverage.

name: Class-A Entity Containment
desc: A Class-A summoning has produced an unbound entity in an inhabited zone. Contain the entity, establish a control binding, and transfer custody to the client's arcane team. Do not destroy it — it is the deliverable.
flavour: The client wants it alive and contained. That is a significantly harder brief than termination.
tooltip: Requires MAG 10+ and binding-capable practitioner.

name: Heritage Site Entity Resolution
desc: A significant heritage property is experiencing mana-field disruption of sufficient intensity to prevent commercial use. Identify the anchoring mechanism, document the entity parameters, and resolve the disruption.
flavour: The heritage protection order on the property limits certain clearance methods. We work within the constraints.
tooltip: Requires dungeon-tier experience. Danger level 3.

name: Unlicensed Death-Spectrum Operation
desc: An unlicensed practitioner is operating a death-spectrum mana facility in a classified zone. The output readings are significantly above Accord threshold. Shut it down and secure the facility.
flavour: The output readings from the facility are not normal. The practitioner running it is operating at a level that makes Accord licensing irrelevant in practical terms.
tooltip: Requires STR 18+, MAG 8+, Level 4+.

name: Legacy Arcane Power Engagement
desc: A pre-Accord arcane entity of considerable age and accumulated power has re-established an operational presence in a classified zone. The engagement parameters are attached. Read them carefully.
flavour: Pre-Accord entities have had a long time to develop capabilities that the current Accord framework does not cover. Treat all briefed parameters as minimums, not maximums.
tooltip: Rare contract. Requires LEAD 14+, MAG 12+, Wardenspeaker on roster.

name: Deep-Site Clearance
desc: A pre-Accord underground installation has been marked active on proximity sensors. Clear all non-compliant entities, document recovered materials, and seal the entry point.
flavour: Pre-Accord sites contain infrastructure the current Accord does not fully understand. That is relevant operational information.
tooltip: Deep-site operation. Environmental and entity hazards beyond standard parameters.

name: Major Entity Territorial Negotiation
desc: A high-classification mana-entity has established territorial presence in a commercially significant zone. The client wants a negotiated boundary, not an engagement. Prior negotiation attempts have not concluded.
flavour: Entities of this classification have operational patience that exceeds most organisations' planning horizons. We are being paid to find the offer that works.
tooltip: Extreme danger. Requires MAG 15+, combined company stats 80+.

name: Pre-Accord Facility Recovery
desc: A pre-Accord arcane research installation has shown renewed mana-activity on proximity sensors. Enter, assess, recover any viable materials, and determine what re-activated the facility.
flavour: Pre-Accord research facilities were not shut down cleanly. Whatever is running in there has been running since before the Accord's founding legislation.
tooltip: High complexity. Requires Level 5+, MAG 12+, roster of 4+.

name: Null-Space Incursion Response
desc: A null-space breach has opened in a monitored zone, allowing through-incursion of entities from outside the mapped mana-spectrum. Contain, document, and close the breach. The documentation is as important as the containment.
flavour: Nothing in the Accord's entity classification system covers what comes through a null breach. We are generating the primary documentation.
tooltip: Sovereign-tier operation. All requirements must be met. No flexibility.

name: Military Intelligence Survey
desc: Conduct a covert assessment of a regional garrison's mana-capability, personnel count, and operational readiness. Deliver a verified intelligence package. Zero operational trace.
flavour: The client wants to know what they would be dealing with before they make a decision. We are providing the basis for that decision.
tooltip: Requires CUN 12+, intelligence infrastructure.

name: Signal Intercept Operation
desc: Intercept and decrypt an encrypted mana-transmission being routed through a monitored relay. Deliver the content to the client without alerting the sender or recipient.
flavour: They believe the transmission is secure. It is secure by public-standard encryption. We are not operating at public standards.
tooltip: Requires CUN 14+, intelligence network upgrade.

name: Asset Recruitment: Conclave Official
desc: A Pale Conclave enforcement official has been assessed as potentially recruitable. Identify their operational grievances, establish covert contact, and secure an information-sharing arrangement.
flavour: Someone inside the system who is willing to talk is worth ten operations conducted from the outside.
tooltip: Requires LEAD 14+, CUN 12+. Conclave relations factor.

name: Accord Data Corruption Operation
desc: Introduce verified inaccuracies into the Ashwood Accord's mana-census dataset for the target territory. The inaccuracies should be subtle, defensible, and damaging to their strategic planning baseline.
flavour: Decisions made on bad data produce bad outcomes. We are the source of the bad data.
tooltip: Requires CUN 16+, intelligence network, Level 5+.

name: Ceasefire Mediation
desc: Two regional powers are in active conflict with no de-escalation pathway. Establish back-channel communication, propose ceasefire terms, and hold the agreement through the initial enforcement period.
flavour: Both parties want a ceasefire. Neither is willing to be seen wanting one. We are the party that is not seen.
tooltip: Requires LEAD 12+, Wardenspeaker recommended.

name: Bilateral Security Arrangement
desc: Negotiate a formal bilateral security pact between the Iron Company and a regional power. The pact provides mutual operational benefit and a formal halt to threat escalation.
flavour: A formal security arrangement is not the same as an alliance. It is a commercial relationship with military dimensions. Those are easier to negotiate.
tooltip: Requires fame 300+, roster of 5+, LEAD 14+.

name: High-Value Personnel Defection
desc: A senior military officer has indicated willingness to defect from their current command structure to Iron Company oversight. Manage the extraction, debrief the asset, and transfer them to secured facility.
flavour: What they are carrying in their head is worth more than the cost of the extraction by a significant margin.
tooltip: Requires LEAD 16+, CUN 14+, intelligence network. Time-sensitive.

name: Strategic Access Point Claim
desc: Establish a documented Iron Company operational claim on a strategic transit corridor. Deploy registration infrastructure, maintain presence through the challenge period, and file with the relevant Accord authority.
flavour: Transit corridors are leverage. Leverage is operational capital.
tooltip: Requires territorial infrastructure, roster of 4+, fame 400+.

name: Settlement Integration
desc: A settlement cluster has indicated willingness to register under Iron Company operational jurisdiction. Complete the integration documentation, establish the mana-grid connection, and submit the Accord registration.
flavour: They chose us over the alternatives. That assessment is on the record now.
tooltip: Requires LEAD 18+, territorial claim on adjacent land.

name: Border Infrastructure Deployment
desc: Establish hardened infrastructure along a contested border zone — mana-monitoring arrays, reinforced positions, and a visible operational presence that changes the territorial calculus.
flavour: A documented and defended border is a fact. Facts are harder to contest than claims.
tooltip: Requires 2 prior territorial contracts, fortifications upgrade.

name: Economic Channel Bypass
desc: A nation-level financial blockade has disrupted regional commerce. Establish alternative mana-credit routing, support affected operators, and demonstrate that the blockade is non-functional.
flavour: A demonstrated non-functional blockade is worse for the imposing nation than no blockade at all. We are making the demonstration.
tooltip: Requires intelligence network, CUN 14+.

name: Competitor Dissolution
desc: A state-sponsored PMC has been operationally targeting the Iron Company. Remove their leadership, collapse their funding structure, and ensure their remaining personnel understand that the contract is closed.
flavour: They were built to end us. The people who built them made a planning error.
tooltip: Requires combined company STR 60+, roster of 5+, Level 6+.

name: Conclave Credibility Operation
desc: Conduct a documented operation that demonstrates the Pale Conclave's Enforcement Division overstepped its authority in the target jurisdiction. Make the documentation available to the appropriate Accord oversight body.
flavour: Their jurisdiction has limits. We are going to locate those limits in a way that produces a formal record.
tooltip: Requires war correspondent or propaganda office, CUN 14+.

name: Thornmark Combine: Coercive Operation
desc: Apply direct operational pressure to Thornmark Combine infrastructure to force a revised engagement policy. The coercion is documented and intentional. The Combine's response will determine the next phase.
flavour: Commercial entities respond to operational cost. We are increasing their operational cost.
tooltip: Requires PMC Tier 3+, combined company stats 100+, intelligence network.

name: Veldrath: Proxy Engagement
desc: Provide deniable military support to a border state in tension with the Veldrath Republic. The engagement is calibrated to constrain Veldrath's force projection without triggering a formal declaration.
flavour: A contained Veldrath is a manageable Veldrath. This operation contributes to containment.
tooltip: Proxy military operation. Requires significant force and operational security.

name: Iron League: Alliance Fracture Operation
desc: Conduct a coordinated operation targeting the political consensus that holds the Iron League's Combined Military Compact together. A fractured Compact cannot be invoked.
flavour: Six members with six separate interests and one shared agreement. The agreement is the target.
tooltip: Requires PMC Tier 4+, all intelligence and political infrastructure, fame 1500+.

name: Veldrath Republic: Field Engagement
desc: Engage and defeat a Veldrath Republic military formation in a direct field engagement. The objective is to demonstrate that the Republic's force projection cannot be applied against the Iron Company without unacceptable cost.
flavour: The Republic has not lost a military engagement in thirty years. We are the engagement that changes that record.
tooltip: Requires PMC Tier 4+, combined company stats 150+, command centre, artillery battery.

name: Ashwood Accord: Direct Confrontation
desc: The Ashwood Accord has issued a suppression mandate against the Iron Company. A direct operational response is required to demonstrate that the mandate cannot be enforced at acceptable cost.
flavour: Accords are not invincible. They are merely large and expensive to engage. You have become capable of the engagement.
tooltip: Maximum scale operation. The Ashwood Accord's full force projection.

name: Establish the Iron Charter
desc: With military capability established, diplomatic recognition secured, and state opposition neutralised or contained, formalise the Iron Company's operational code, territorial claims, and governing principles into a binding Charter document.
flavour: You always knew it would come to this. It is more satisfying to be right than it is to be surprised.
tooltip: The final objective. The Iron Company becomes a sovereign force.
